name: Heartland Raisin Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients at room temperature.
2. Toast walnuts briefly in a moderately hot oven until they begin to give off aroma, then let cool and rub off papery husks. Break into pieces or chop coarsely.
3. Combine all ingredients except raisins and nuts with the bread pan in the order listed; reverse if your machine specifies dry ingredients first.
4. Set the machine on basic cycle with medium crust. At the beep, add the raisins and nuts to the dough.
5. For larger pieces of raisins and nuts in the final loaf, reserve about half and add 2-3 minutes after the beep, allowing enough time for the kneading cycle to incorporate the final batch.
6. Do not use a programmable timer, as this bread contains perishable ingredients.
